_note: Curated text->3D prompts for the GAME-ONLY fighters the agents are cleared to generate (see CLAUDE.md MODEL OWNERSHIP DIRECTIVE). Do NOT add book/canon characters or Onyx's stable here — those are the owner's. Style suffix keeps them a consistent roster.
_style: full-body pro wrestler, T-pose, game-ready, clean single mesh, PBR textured, neutral background, symmetrical, muscular athletic build, no props

VIPER.prompt: a lean southpaw counter-puncher wrestler, icy pale-blue and silver ring gear, cold calculating look, snake-scale trim, short slick hair
